description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. 

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a central crosshair reticle. A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant, near the center of the frame. The background appears to show an indistinct mountain range or cloud formation.This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B1
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) in 2025, consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system. The original imagery was altered with redactions, and no accompanying mission report was provided. The operator reported being unable to positively identify the UAP, and the date in the image was incorrect due to system settings. The monochrome, grainy image displays a central crosshair reticle and a small, dark, circular object in the upper right quadrant, against an indistinct mountain range or cloud formation.
reported_object_description: A small, dark, circular object is visible in the upper right quadrant, near the center of the frame.
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B1 - Page 1

**Document title:** FBI Photo B1
**Source file:** FBI Photo B1.pdf
**Page:** 1 of 1
**Agency:** FBI
**Release date:** 5/8/26
**Dataset description:** Incident date: Late 2025; Incident location: Western United States

***

[redacted]

[Sensor overlay with central crosshair and horizontal scale markings: 15 | 10 | 5 | 0 | 5 | 10 | 15]

[redacted]
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份报告，其中包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。原始图像经过编辑和涂黑处理，且未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP，图像中的日期因系统设置不正确。该单色、颗粒状图像显示一个中央十字线分划板，右上象限有一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体，背景为模糊的山脉或云层。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体在右上象限可见，靠近画面中心。
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO.
Report includes a still image from a U.S. military system.
Operator could not positively identify the UAP.
Image shows a small, dark, circular object.
claims_zh: 联邦调查局向AARO提交了一份UAP报告。
报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静态图像。
操作员无法明确识别该UAP。
图像显示一个小型、黑暗、圆形物体。
